name: fal-image-edit
description: AI-powered image editing with style transfer and object removal
capabilities: Apply artistic style transfer to images using AI
Edit images via natural language prompts
Integrate fal.ai API for image processing
Generate edited images through Claude Code
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analysis flagged 4 patterns (2 URL references, 2 cryptographic algorithm warnings). Manual review confirms all findings are FALSE POSITIVES: URLs are documentation links in markdown (not data exfiltration), and cryptographic warnings are incorrect pattern matches on plain text. The skill is simple documentation for the fal.ai image editing API with no malicious code.
valueStatement: This skill enables AI-powered image editing including style transfer and object removal through the fal.ai API. It provides patterns and guidance for integrating computer vision capabilities into Claude workflows.
userTitle: Edit Images with AI Style Transfer
limitations: Requires fal.ai API key for functionality
Usage costs depend on fal.ai API pricing
Image processing speed depends on API response times
Quality of output depends on input image resolution

useCases.targetUser: Graphic designers needing quick AI-assisted image modifications
useCases.title: Graphic Designer Image Editing
useCases.description: Apply artistic styles to client images quickly without manual editing tools

useCases.targetUser: Software developers integrating AI image capabilities
useCases.title: Developer Image Processing Integration
useCases.description: Build applications that use AI-powered image editing through fal.ai API

useCases.targetUser: Content creators and social media managers
useCases.title: Content Creator Visual Enhancement
useCases.description: Remove objects or apply styles to social media content

promptTemplates.title: Basic Style Transfer
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the fal-image-edit skill to apply [STYLE_NAME] style to [IMAGE_DESCRIPTION]
promptTemplates.scenario: Applying a single artistic style to an image

promptTemplates.title: Object Removal
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the fal-image-edit skill to remove [OBJECT_TO_REMOVE] from [IMAGE_DESCRIPTION]

promptTemplates.title: Combined Editing
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the fal-image-edit skill to remove [OBJECT] and apply [STYLE] to [IMAGE]
promptTemplates.scenario: Performing multiple edits in one operation

promptTemplates.title: Batch Processing
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the fal-image-edit skill to apply [STYLE] to each image in [IMAGE_LIST]
promptTemplates.scenario: Applying consistent edits to multiple images

bestPractices: Provide clear and specific descriptions of the source image for better results
Use precise language when describing objects to remove or styles to apply
Test with simple edits first before attempting complex transformations
antiPatterns: Do not include sensitive or personal information in image descriptions sent to the API
Avoid requesting edits that violate terms of service for the fal.ai platform
Do not assume unlimited API calls - monitor usage and costs

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a fal.ai API key to use this skill. Sign up at fal.ai to get your credentials.

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: The fal.ai API supports common formats including JPEG, PNG, and WebP. Check fal.ai documentation for the full list.

faq.question: How much does using the fal.ai API cost?
faq.answer: API pricing varies based on the specific endpoint and usage. Refer to the fal.ai pricing page for current rates.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for commercial projects?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use the edited images for commercial projects subject to fal.ai terms of service.

faq.question: How long does image processing take?
faq.answer: Processing time depends on image size and complexity. Typical edits complete in seconds to a few minutes.

faq.question: Does this skill store my images?
faq.answer: Images are processed through fal.ai API. Review their privacy policy for data handling details.
